rationale: The citing paper references Ding (2007) only in a grouped citation with Ding, Grewal, and Liechty (2005) to support a general motivation that non-incentive-aligned responses can deviate from true preferences. The paper's upgrading procedure, BDM implementation details, and empirical modeling are not explicitly developed as a direct build on Ding (2007) in the main text. Thus, the cited work functions as background support rather than a distinct conceptual or methodological backbone for this article.
